story.title: Our Story

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our inflatable screens
faq.q1: What is the lifespan of a Hallucine inflatable screen?
faq.a1: Our screens are guaranteed for 10 years and can last much longer with proper maintenance. The projection surface is replaceable.
faq.q2: How long does it take to set up a screen?
faq.a2: Setup takes about 10 minutes for 2 people, without tools. Deflation is even faster.
faq.a3: Our screens are tested up to 80 km/h wind. Beyond that, we recommend deflating them as a precaution.
faq.a4: Yes, we ship worldwide. Delivery times vary depending on the destination.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Our team is available to answer all your questions
